title: TCompat
description: An addon to tinkers' construct that aims to add some materials and traits
body:
TCompat is an addon to Tinkers' Construct that adds some materials and traits / modifiers that use features from other mods, to allow modpack developers more ways to bridge the game between mods.

This integration is fully modular, so if you only want to play with some of the mods this addon provides compatibility to, you can do so.

For the full list of integration you can check out the [appropriate page](https://github.com/MtcLeo05/TCompat/blob/1.20.1/README.md)
